Class MyHTTPServer

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Thread
server.MyHTTPServer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, Runnable, HTTPServer
public class MyHTTPServer extends Thread implements HTTPServer
A small generic HTTP server for the project. The server listens on a port, parses every client request with RequestParser, finds the matching servlet by command and URI prefix, and lets the servlet write the answer back to the client.

  • Constructor Details

    • MyHTTPServer

      public MyHTTPServer(int port, int nThreads)
      Creates a new HTTP server.
      Parameters:
      port - port to listen on
      nThreads - maximum number of worker threads
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if port or nThreads are illegal

  • Method Details

    • addServlet

      public void addServlet(String httpCommanmd, String uri, Servlet s)
      Adds a servlet for a command and URI prefix.
      Specified by:
      addServlet in interface HTTPServer
      Parameters:
      httpCommanmd - HTTP command, for example GET, POST or DELETE
      uri - URI prefix
      s - servlet to run

    • removeServlet

      public void removeServlet(String httpCommanmd, String uri)
      Removes a servlet from a command and URI prefix.
      Specified by:
      removeServlet in interface HTTPServer
      Parameters:
      httpCommanmd - HTTP command
      uri - URI prefix

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the server thread. Calling it more than once is ignored.
      Specified by:
      start in interface HTTPServer
      Overrides:
      start in class Thread

    • run

      public void run()
      The main server loop. It waits for clients. Every accepted socket is sent to the worker pool, so several clients can be handled at the same time.
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable
      Overrides:
      run in class Thread

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the server, all registered servlets and the worker pool.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface Closeable

    • getNThreads

      public int getNThreads()
      Returns:
      maximum number of worker threads
